message:
Dear There Team, 
I came across your business and was impressed with the work you do. I'd like to introduce a potential opportunity that could benefit your company. It would be great to discuss this further with you. Would you be open to a short call this week? This will give us a chance to explore how we can work together. I look forward to hearing from you.
Best regards

We look forward to the possibility of speaking with you soon.
Best regards
